---
name: "\U0001F9E9 New Widget Request"
about: Request a dedicated widget for a specific service
title: "[WIDGET] "
labels: enhancement, tirage, widget-request
assignees: ''

---

**Service Name**
Name of the service (e.g., Pi-hole, Plex, Jellyfin).

**Official Website / Docker Image**
Link to the project or the official Docker Hub image.

**Key Features/Stats to Display**
What specific data should the widget show? (e.g., active streams, blocked ads count, temperature).

**API Documentation (Optional)**
If you have a link to the API documentation for this service, please provide it here.

**Proposed Widget Size**
- [ ] 1x1 (Small icon)
- [ ] 2x1 (Wide bar)
- [ ] 2x2 (Standard square)
- [ ] 3x3 (Expanded detail view)

**Additional context**
Add any other info or UI ideas here.
